mapper.select: SELECT UNVEILING_NO, UNVEILING_TITLE, PRODUCTION_ARTIST, PRODUCTION_YEAR, PRODUCTION_MATERIAL, PRODUCTION_SIZE, START_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, FINAL_PRICE, BIDDING_COUNT, FINISH_DATE, PRODUCTION_DETAIL, ARTIST_DETAIL, UNVEILING_STATUS, MEMBER_NO, FINALIZED_FL, PAYMENT_STATUS, PAYMENT_DUE_DATE, PAID_DATE FROM UNVEILING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo} FOR UPDATE

SELECT UNVEILING_NO, UNVEILING_TITLE, PRODUCTION_ARTIST, PRODUCTION_YEAR, PRODUCTION_MATERIAL, PRODUCTION_SIZE, START_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, FINAL_PRICE, BIDDING_COUNT, FINISH_DATE, PRODUCTION_DETAIL, ARTIST_DETAIL, UNVEILING_STATUS, MEMBER_NO, FINALIZED_FL, PAYMENT_STATUS FROM UNVEILING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
SELECT CASE WHEN FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE <= SYSDATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM UNVEILING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE UNVEILING SET MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}, FINAL_PRICE = #{finalPrice}, FINALIZED_FL = 1, PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PENDING', PAYMENT_DUE_DATE = SYSDATE + 1 WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
UPDATE UNVEILING SET PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PAID', PAID_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo} AND PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PENDING' AND PAYMENT_DUE_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > PAYMENT_DUE_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM UNVEILING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE UNVEILING SET PAYMENT_STATUS = 'EXPIRED' WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo} AND PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PENDING'
